title: aXcore ax2 dual-issue in-order superscalar RV32IM (tunable)

issue_width.doc: Instructions issued per cycle: 2 is superscalar, 1 keeps the cache and predictor but retires one per cycle for a smaller part.

icache_kb.doc: Instruction cache size in KiB. Must be a power of two; a 4-word line means the smallest useful size is 1.

btb_entries.doc: Branch-target-buffer entries, or 0 to drop prediction entirely (every taken branch then costs a redirect).
